author: Maddie Austin
text: Went on a tour from Avani+ hotel. This tour was great when we came during end of rainy season, we felt we did not get to see much due to the weather. We had one great day and booked this tour. So glad we did! It felt like we were able to see all that Thailand had to offer in one day. Informative starting at 813 Police boar to discuss the 2004 Tsunami devastation then seeing monkeys in the wild. Heading up the feed and bathe elephants, we also went to navy turtle conservatory on the way which there was a lovely coffee shop there. We felt very relaxed and not rushed at all being on our own schedule. We also went to Lumpee waterfall which was breathtaking and the best for last, bamboo raft down the river! It felt very safe and exhilarating. Pong was our tour guide and he is also my best friend now. So happy with this tour would do it again in a heartbeat thank you!

author: Vasile Vlad
text: The amazing three temples trip was amazing. Me my wife and my son all had an amazing time. Tour guide and Driver was also super friendly, there was never a silent or awkward moment.

author: Andrei Rei
text: Absolutely amazing, the temples were beautiful. The staff, driver and tour guide were also all so very kind. If you stay in Khao Lak, you should definitely book an excursion with them.

author: KathD
text: I've been on several trips with Khaolak Land Discovery, and every experience has been absolutely fantastic! From : Hong Island, the Khao Sok jungle trek, Khao Sok lake day tour, to the stunning Phi Phi Island, each trip was well-organized and memorable. The guides are not only skilled and knowledgeable but also genuinely caring and professional. Their positive attitude and attention to detail truly made every tour special. I highly recommend Kala Land Discovery, to anyone planning their adventures in Khao Lak— you’ll be in great hands! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

author: Teemo Fujiwara
text:
Went on a Khao Sok tour w my friend.
The lady gave me the best pride and lucky us in the boat and in the van were only 4 people. Amazing guide, great time. Recommend 100% 🇰🇿

author: Vignesh Raj
text:
We booked early morning Surin snorkelling. The owner, an elderly gentleman was kind enough to help us with personalised request for the booking. The service and tour was exceptional.

The boats, jackets and gears were well maintained. Our guide was super friendly. The best experience one could get.

Highly recommend 💯

author: Ewelina Wieczorek-Skibińska
text: I was a great trip. Our tour guide GIFT took care of everything. We have a beautiful photos.

author: Bryan Hood
text: Absolutely amazing day! Jib was an outstanding and very knowledgeable guide. Her English was very good, as well. It was a full day of activities and learning. The van was very comfy and air conditioned. The food for lunch was very good. The elephant experience is unforgettable. This day trip was the highlight of our vacation to Thailand. Thank you so much for the memories!

author: Kate VDP
text:
We have now done a similan islands tour with this company and most recently a surin island and both were a true highlight. They leave earlier than most trips which means you have an amazing experience. Every staff member on our recent surin Island trip were so kind and truly looked after us. Big shout out to Anne and our captain on boat 777. Both were so incredibly generous to our 8 year old and looked after us like we were good friends.
The snorkelling on Surin was unmatched and the beaches on similian were out of this world. Do both tours!

author: Simon Yeramian
text: We did the tour of Khao Sok NP where we stayed deep in the jungle on floating bamboo huts. This was one of the highlights of our Thailand trip. Everything was better than expected! I’ve never travelled anywhere this far from any civilization. Our guide Aris was exceptional, we saw dozens of monkeys on our multiple excursions in the jungle, and had a great time at camp. Don’t miss it!

author: Elena Rossi
text: The Similan Islands are a dream come true! Crystal clear water and white sand. The team from Khao Lak Land Discovery was so professional and took us to the best spots before the big crowds arrived. Best day ever! ✨

author: Markus Weber
text: Ein unvergessliches Erlebnis im Khao Sok Nationalpark! Die Übernachtung in den Bamboo Huts auf dem See war magisch. Unser Guide war sehr erfahren und konnte uns viele Tiere zeigen. Absolut empfehlenswert!

author: Julien Dupont
text: Excursion incroyable dans la baie de Phang Nga ! Le canoë dans les grottes était le moment fort. L'organisation est parfaite et le déjeuner sur l'île de Panyee était délicieux. Merci à toute l'équipe !

author: Sarah Jenkins
text: Fascinating day at the three temples. Our guide explained the history and culture so well. It was very peaceful and respectful. Great way to see the real Thailand.

author: Hans Schnitzler
text: Die Elephant Care Tour war das Highlight unserer Reise. Man merkt, dass die Tiere hier gut behandelt werden. Kein Reiten, nur Füttern und Baden. Ein tolles Erlebnis für die ganze Familie!

author: Manon Lamberton
text: Plongée avec tuba aux îles Surin. C'était comme nager dans un aquarium ! Les coraux sont magnifiques et nous avons vu beaucoup de poissons colorés. Guide très gentil et attentif.

author: David Miller
text: James Bond Island was busy but beautiful! Our guide timed everything perfectly so we avoids the worst of the crowds. Canoeing was peaceful and the views were spectacular.

author: Karin Müller
text: Wunderschöner Sonnenuntergang in der Phang Nga Bucht. Die Katamaran-Tour war sehr entspannt und das Essen an Bord war fantastisch. Ein perfekter Abschluss für unseren Urlaub.

author: Lucie Bernard
text: La découverte de Khao Sok était Top ! Nous avons vu des singes et même un calao. Le paysage est à couper le souffle. Guide passionné et très professionnel.

author: Robert Fletcher
text: Bamboo rafting down the river was so relaxing. The scenery is lush and beautiful. The staff is friendly and everything was very well organized. Great for a chill day.
